products.name: Regular Snow White Pebbles
products.description: Classic rounded snow white pebbles — the most popular decorative pebble in Sydney gardens. Clean, bright and timeless for any garden style.

products.name: Crushed Snow White Pebbles
products.description: Angular crushed white stone with a bright, clean appearance. Ideal for contemporary pathways, drainage applications and under-downpipe areas.

products.name: Charcoal Grey Pebbles
products.description: Smooth charcoal grey pebbles with subtle earthy variation. A versatile, contemporary choice for garden beds, pathways and water features.

products.name: Charcoal Lava Pebbles
products.description: Lightweight volcanic lava pebbles in dark charcoal tones. Highly porous — ideal as a planting medium, pot topper and feature garden accent.

products.name: Red Lava Pebbles
products.description: Striking volcanic red lava pebbles — warm, bold tones that add drama to garden beds, potted plants and feature areas. Lightweight and highly porous.

products.name: Pine Bark Mulch
products.description: Natural pine bark mulch — a classic Australian garden choice for suppressing weeds, retaining soil moisture and improving garden bed appearance. Long lasting and slow to break down.

products.name: Hardwood Mulch
products.description: Premium hardwood mulch for a natural, earthy garden look. Excellent weed suppression and moisture retention, breaking down slowly to improve soil structure over time.

products.name: Sugar Cane Mulch
products.description: Light and easy to spread sugar cane mulch — Australia's favourite vegetable garden mulch. Breaks down quickly to enrich soil with organic matter.

products.name: Tea Tree Mulch
products.description: Fragrant tea tree mulch with natural anti-fungal properties. Ideal for garden beds and around native plants. Distinctive aroma and long-lasting performance.

products.name: Premium Garden Soil Mix
products.description: A rich, well-balanced blend of composted organic matter, perlite and natural minerals. Ideal for garden beds, raised beds and mixed plantings.

products.name: Vegie & Herb Mix
products.description: Specially formulated for vegetable gardens and herb beds. Nutrient-rich with added trace elements to support healthy food production.

products.name: Native Soil Blend
products.description: A low-phosphorus, free-draining blend specifically designed for Australian native plants. Prevents phosphorus toxicity in sensitive species.

products.name: Raised Bed Mix
products.description: Premium blend engineered for raised garden beds and planter boxes. Provides excellent drainage, aeration and long-term nutrient supply.

products.name: Sydney Sand
products.description: Clean, washed Sydney sand — a versatile all-purpose sand suitable for concrete mixing, paver bedding, sandpits and general landscaping applications.

products.name: Coarse Sand
products.description: Coarse-grade washed sand for drainage improvement, soil conditioning and general landscaping. Ideal for mixing into heavy clay soils or as a drainage layer.

products.name: Play Sand
products.description: Fine, washed and screened play sand — safe for children's sandpits and soft fall areas. Dust-reduced with smooth, consistent grain size.

bulkMaterials.name: Bulk Garden Soil
bulkMaterials.description: Premium garden soil blend — rich in organic matter, suitable for garden beds, lawn preparation and landscaping fill.

bulkMaterials.name: Bulk Turf Blend
bulkMaterials.description: Premium turf underlay blend with added sand and fertiliser. Ideal for laying new lawns and top dressing established turf.

bulkMaterials.name: Washed Sand
bulkMaterials.description: Clean washed concrete sand, free of clay and impurities. Suitable for concrete mixing, plastering and general construction.

bulkMaterials.name: Coarse Sand
bulkMaterials.description: Coarse-grade washed sand for drainage applications, garden soil improvement and general landscaping use.

bulkMaterials.name: Brickie's Sand
bulkMaterials.description: Fine plasticity sand for bricklaying, block laying and mortar applications. Consistent particle size for reliable mixes.

bulkMaterials.name: Blue Metal 10mm
bulkMaterials.description: Clean 10mm blue metal aggregate for concrete mixing, drainage, under-slab applications and driveway construction.

bulkMaterials.name: Blue Metal 20mm
bulkMaterials.description: 20mm blue metal aggregate for road base, drainage and concrete applications where larger aggregate is specified.

bulkMaterials.name: Crusher Dust
bulkMaterials.description: Fine crushed aggregate — ideal for compacting under pavers, paths and as a levelling base. Binds firmly when compacted and dampened.

bulkMaterials.name: River Gravel
bulkMaterials.description: Rounded river gravel in warm natural tones. Beautiful for feature gardens, water features, dry creek beds and large decorative areas.
